prompt:
A realistic vertical indoor glamorous lifestyle portrait set in a warm, luxurious bathroom. An adult East Asian woman, 21+ years old, sitting on a marble bathroom countertop next to a large gold-framed mirror. Framed from the upper thighs to the top of the head, slightly to the right. The body is turned away from the camera, with the face looking back over the shoulder towards the viewer. A calm, soft, subtly intimate expression—gentle direct eye contact, relaxed lips, exquisite eyeliner, natural eyelashes, warm peach blush, glowing skin, and a glossy, low-key coral pink lip color.

Person: Dark brown-black hair styled in a loose low bun—soft volume with wisps framing the face and loose curls around the neck and cheeks. Warm highlights capture the shoulders and upper back—a delicate and elegant silhouette. A wide white button-down shirt slips off the shoulder, revealing the collarbone and upper back in a dignified fashion photography style. The fabric is crisp but slightly wrinkled—with loose folds at the arms, waist, and knees. A relaxed morning hotel vibe.

Scene: Sitting by a large mirror—the back and hair softly reflected on the left side of the frame. A warm antique gold mirror frame reflecting the white shirt, shoulder lines, and dark bun. Foreground: Edge of a marble sink, smooth stone surface, vintage gold faucet fixtures with round handles. Background right: A small circular wall-mounted magnifying mirror with a gold frame, light-colored polished bathroom tiles with subtle reflections.

Lighting: Warm, cinematic, soft directional light from the upper right front—golden highlights on the face, shoulders, collarbone, back, shirt folds, mirror frame, faucet hardware, and marble surface. Soft shadows around the mirror and bathroom walls. Shallow depth of field, exquisite portrait quality. Palette: Warm ivory, soft beige marble, antique gold, understated gray tiles, dark brown-black hair, natural glowing skin tones.

Style: Hyper-realistic luxury bathroom portrait, adult model, oversized white off-the-shoulder shirt, sitting on marble countertop, gold-framed mirror reflection, warm hotel bathroom lighting, soft backward gaze, elegant intimate atmosphere, realistic skin texture, detailed fabric folds, cinematic shadows, vertical orientation, high detail. No text, no watermarks, no logos, no extra people, no deformed bodies, no cartoonish feel, no harsh flash, no cluttered elements, no explicit nudity.

promptZh:
一张写实的竖版室内迷人生活方式肖像，场景设定在温暖奢华的浴室中。一位 成年东亚女性，21 岁以上，坐在 大理石浴室台面 上，旁边是一面大型金色边框镜子。构图从大腿上部到头顶，略微偏右。身体背对镜头，脸部回眸看向观众。表情平静、柔和且带有微妙的亲密感——温柔的直接眼神交流、放松的双唇、精致的眼线、自然的睫毛、温暖的桃色腮红、透亮的肌肤以及光泽感十足的低调珊瑚粉唇色。

人物：深棕黑色头发梳成松散的低发髻——发型蓬松，有几缕发丝修饰脸庞，颈部和脸颊周围有松散的卷发。温暖的高光捕捉到肩膀和上背部——勾勒出精致优雅的轮廓。一件 宽松的白色衬衫 从肩部滑落，以端庄的时尚摄影风格展现出锁骨和上背部。布料挺括但略带褶皱——在手臂、腰部和膝盖处有松散的褶皱。营造出一种轻松的酒店清晨氛围。

场景：坐在大镜子旁——背部和头发在画面左侧柔和地反射出来。温暖的古董金色镜框反射出白色衬衫、肩部线条和深色发髻。前景：大理石洗手台边缘、光滑的石材表面、带有圆形把手的复古金色水龙头装置。右侧背景：一面带有金色边框的小型壁挂式放大镜，浅色抛光浴室瓷砖带有微妙的反射。

光影：温暖、电影感、来自右上方的柔和定向光——在脸部、肩膀、锁骨、背部、衬衫褶皱、镜框、水龙头五金件和大理石表面上形成金色高光。镜子周围和浴室墙壁上有柔和的阴影。浅景深，精致的肖像品质。色调：暖象牙色、柔和米色大理石、古董金、低调的灰色瓷砖、深棕黑色头发、自然的透亮肤色。

风格：超写实奢华浴室肖像，成年模特，超大号白色露肩衬衫，坐在大理石台面上，金色边框镜面反射，温暖的酒店浴室灯光，柔和的回眸凝视，优雅亲密的氛围，真实的皮肤质感，细腻的布料褶皱，电影级阴影，竖向构图，高细节。无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无额外人物，无畸形身体，无卡通感，无强闪光，无杂乱元素，无露骨裸露。
